description.value:
Your ancestors left the elven homeland for the jungles of Asana. Your family's deep and lasting bond to Castrovel's wild heart remains, but unlike the elves of Sovyrian, your connection to Asana's biome has unlocked a form of telepathy not unlike what your lashunta neighbors possess.

You can communicate mentally with creatures within 30 feet that share a language with you. This doesn't give you any access to their thoughts and communicates no more information than normal speech would.
